sourceMovie.title: Taken 2
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: People revisit Taken 2 for the same reason it broke through in 2012: clear stakes, memorable faces, and a crime rhythm that doesn't stall in the middle. Olivier Megaton keeps the ensemble pointed in one direction. The action and crime blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Along Came a Spider
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Taken 2 clicked for you, Along Came a Spider (2001) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and crime, with unease that lingers after the credits. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Taken 2?
faq.answer: Try Along Came a Spider, War, Hostage—each shares DNA with Taken 2 while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Taken 2?
faq.answer: Taken 2 (2012) is best described as Action, Crime, Thriller. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Taken 2 part of a franchise?
faq.answer: Yes—it's part of the "Taken Collection" storyline. You can enjoy it standalone, but sequels and tie-ins build on characters and continuity established here.
